case_title: DULAY, CONSUELO N. vs. UBALDE, MARIO R. et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-25-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT OF DEFT. MARIO UBALDE, AND PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT ELAINE WELLS WOULD BE DISMISSED. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, ELAINE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-08-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR FILING AND ENTERING DEFAULT JUDGMENT. PARTIES REQUIRED TO BE PRESENT IF DEFAULT JUDGMENT HAS NOT BEEN ENTERED. HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DULAY, CONSUELO N. AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDE, MARIO R. WELLS, ELAINE DOES 1 TO FOUR SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-23-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-05-1996
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DULAY, CONSUELO N. SERVED MAR-21-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDE, MARIO R.

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CONTINUED FROM 6/6/96: FOR FILING AND ENTERING DEFAULT JUDGMENT BEFORE 7/12/96. HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-24-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-24-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT ON DEFT. MARIO R. UBALDE. IF DEFAULT IS NOT ENTERED AND/OR THERE IS NO APPEARANCE ON 8/23/96 COURT WILL DISMISS CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-20-1996 CONTINUED FROM JUL-24-1996 TO AUG-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CORRESPONDENCE RE: INCORRECT ZIP CODE. ZIP CODE CORRECTED IN SYSTEM. RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF DULAY, CONSUELO N.
